dbPath.description: Path to SQLite database file. Defaults to ~/.openclaw/memory/mnemosyne.db

ownerObserveOthers.description: Whether owner messages are captured alongside agent messages

noisePatterns.description: Substring patterns to skip when capturing messages (e.g. HEARTBEAT_OK, cron reminders)

maxMessagesPerSession.description: Automatic pruning: keep only N most recent messages per session

maxMemoriesPerSession.description: Automatic pruning: keep only N most recent explicit memories per session
